name: bugshot
description: Ephemeral screenshot gallery for visual bug review and issue filing

interface.shortDescription: Visual bug review and issue filing
interface.longDescription: Bugshot launches a local screenshot gallery in your browser. Review screenshots, type comments on any issues you spot, and let the agent compose and file them as issues in your tracker — all in one session with zero external dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Run bugshot on my screenshots directory and help me file issues for what you find.
Launch the bugshot gallery on ~/Desktop/screenshots and file any bugs as GitHub issues.
